testResults.note: S5 is UI integration — tested via existing unit tests for fetchBackup/restoreFromBackup (S2/S3). UI dialog behavior is a visual integration concern.

summary: Integrated relay backup restore into the mnemonic recovery flow in settings.tsx. After identity derivation, fetchBackup() checks for an existing backup via getBackupRelays(). If found, a Chakra UI Modal dialog warns that restore replaces all local data. On confirm, restoreFromBackup() is called and the page reloads. On skip/dismiss, identity-only recovery continues. If no backup exists or fetch fails, the flow proceeds as before.
verification_notes: All verification questions passed on first review. Minor note: dialog text is hardcoded English instead of using i18n copy system.
